detail.notFoundNoId: We could not find any tour (id missing in URL)

detail.mustLoginComment: You must be logged in to comment.

detail.signupSuccess: You are now signed up for this date. See My page for an overview.
detail.signupError: Something went wrong when signing up.
detail.commentMinLength: A comment must be at least 3 characters.
detail.reportDemo: Reporting is a demo here. (Connect to backend later)
detail.unregisterDialogBody: You are about to unregister from <1>{{date}}</1>. You can sign up again later if there is still space.
detail.groupChatBodyOne: You have {{count}} locked tour date with a group chat. Open it from the messages page.
detail.groupChatBodyMany: You have {{count}} locked tour dates with group chats. Open them from the messages page.
detail.noActiveDates: No active dates at the moment. Historical dates are shown below if any exist.
detail.datesIntro: Sign up for one or more dates. If you're signed up for several, the date that ends up with enough participants will be locked.
detail.dateClosed: This date is not open for registration.
detail.turvettBody: Stay on trails where possible, show consideration, and take your trash home. Nature is not a dumpster.
detail.turvettDemoAlert: Demo: You could link to an info page on outdoor ethics here.
detail.loginToComment: Log in to leave a comment.
detail.noCommentsYet: No comments yet. Be the first to share!
detail.dateIsLocked: This date is locked. Other dates were freed.
detail.confirmLock: Lock this date? Other dates on this tour will be freed.
detail.confirmCancel: Cancel this date? All registrations are freed.
detail.statusError: Could not change the status of the date.
detail.cabinsIntro: This tour passes {{count}} cabins in order.

story.intro: This is a tour that gives a clear nature experience with good progression. Go steadily, take breaks, and use the conditions to your advantage.
story.diffEasy: Suitable for a calm day and for those who want a more accessible tour.
story.diffMedium: Gives enough elevation and length for the tour to feel real, without being too extreme.
story.diffHard: You should have good shoes, some experience, and be prepared for a more physical tour.
story.diffExpert: This is a tour for strong legs and good judgment.
story.regionWest: Western Norway can change weather fast, so it's worth packing for more than just sun.
story.regionNorth: Northern Norway gives big nature experiences, but demands respect for weather and distances.
story.regionEast: Eastern Norway often has nice and stable conditions, but wet trails and weather shifts must still be taken seriously.
story.regionTrondelag: Trøndelag often offers varied terrain and tours that can surprise along the way.
story.regionSouth: Southern Norway can give calm and pleasant tours with good stops along the way.
story.typeWith: The tour type is {{type}}, so it's wise to adjust pace and equipment accordingly.
story.typeWithout: Adapt the tour to the conditions and your form that day.
